description: Flatten Elasticsearch Watcher history docs for the CPM dashboard

script.source: def status = ctx.status; def execState = status != null && status.execution_state != null ? status.execution_state : (ctx.state != null ? ctx.state : 'unknown'); boolean ok = true; def failed = new ArrayList(); if (status != null && status.actions != null) { for (def entry : status.actions.entrySet()) { def last = entry.getValue().last_execution; if (last != null && last.successful == false) { ok = false; failed.add(entry.getKey()); } } } if (execState == 'failed' || execState == 'execution_failed') ok = false; ctx.execution_state = execState; ctx.successful = ok; ctx.failed_actions = failed;
